catalog_content:
Item Name: Gerber Snacks for Baby, Yogurt Melts (Strawberry)
Bullet Point 1: Made with Real Yogurt & Fruit
Bullet Point 2: No Preservatives
Bullet Point 3: Learning to Pickup
Bullet Point 4: Live & Active(R) Cultures
Bullet Point 5: 1 oz package
Product Description: Our Approach to Sustainability Gerber was founded on the ambition to give babies the best start in life. That's why our work doesn't stop at nutrition, and why every day, we take action to protect the planet so Gerber babies will grow and thrive for generations to come. Responsible Agriculture We're committed to sourcing high-quality ingredients that nourish your baby and the planet through our Clean Field Farming practices. Accountable Supply Chain We're working toward zero waste, and reducing carbon emissions and water use by 35% by 2020. Clean Field Farming We're building on our commitment to the Clean Field Farming practice and striving for even bigger things. In our new partnership with TerraCycle, we're working to make all our packaging 100% nationally recyclable. Together, we're working to ensure our little ones can live in a world that's as pure as they are. Our Research With 24 research technology centers worldwide, Nestlé has the largest food research and development network of any food company. Nestlé’s Worldwide Research & Development network provides three fundamental areas of benefits for parents: safety and quality; nutrition and health; and taste, texture, and convenience. Gerber Nutritional Journey We’ve got the Gerber Nutrition Journey: a milestone based plan dedicated to helping babies grow up healthy and happy. We take pride in knowing that everything we do for our little ones extends from Pregnancy to Preschooler.
Value: 3.0
Unit: Ounce
product_name: Snacks for Baby Yogurt Melts Strawberry
overall_summary: Gerber’s baby snack is positioned as a nutritious, convenient option for infants aged 8+ months, leveraging its established brand trust in pediatric nutrition. The resealable pouch and small 1 oz size cater to portion control and convenience for caregivers, aligning with premium baby food perceptions despite lack of organic or specialty certifications. Real fruit and yogurt ingredients, along with a focus on sustainability claims, support a mid-to-high price point relative to standard baby snacks.
